title: Project Reply Draft
description: Domain truth object representing a draft reply to a project party, incorporating claims, evidence, posture context, and tone guidance.

target_party_id.description: Party the reply is addressed to.

topic.description: Subject or topic of the reply.

thread_id.description: Optional reference to the communication thread.

claims_to_address.description: Claim IDs this reply intends to address.

evidence_to_cite.description: Evidence IDs to cite in the reply.

posture_context.description: Posture IDs providing context for the reply.

risk_level.description: Risk level associated with the reply.

draft_body.description: Full text of the draft reply.

source_authority.description: System or authority that produced this record.

generated_at.description: Timestamp when this record was generated.

generated_by.description: Identity of the agent or process that generated this record.
